title: game_feel_pass
description: One focused visual and motion design pass for a working game prototype. Produced by the Visual and Motion Design Agent. Covers visual hierarchy, depth, color, motion, and state-to-feedback mapping.

main_visual_problem.description: One-paragraph diagnosis of the primary visual or game-feel issue.

why_it_matters.description: Why this visual problem affects learning, engagement, or readability.

proposed_pass.description: One-sentence name and summary of the pass.

changes.description: Ordered list of concrete visual/motion changes.

area.description: Which component or visual area this affects.

what.description: What changes visually or in motion.

why.description: Why this change improves feel, hierarchy, or readability.

implementation.description: Concrete implementation guidance — CSS, animation values, color codes, component changes.

priority_order.description: Change IDs in order of visual impact. Implement in this order.

state_feedback_map.description: Maps game states to their visual/motion feedback treatment.

visual.description: Color, glow, border, or surface treatment for this state.

motion.description: Animation or transition for this state.

audio_hint.description: Suggested audio cue (not implemented — for future reference).

reusable_tokens.description: Color, spacing, timing, and shadow tokens that can be reused across games in this family.

verification_plan.description: How to verify the pass worked — what to look for during playtest.
